Capsid Protein.description: Capsid proteins forming the icosahedral or other geometric viral shell

Nucleocapsid Protein.description: Nucleocapsid proteins packaging and condensing the viral genome in helical or amorphous structures

Envelope/Surface Glycoprotein.description: Envelope and surface glycoproteins mediating receptor binding, membrane fusion, and viral entry

Matrix/Tegument Structural.description: Matrix and tegument proteins bridging capsid and envelope, involved in assembly and budding

DNA Packaging/Capsid Maturation.description: Proteins involved in DNA translocation into capsids and capsid maturation (mainly dsDNA viruses)

Tail/Baseplate Structural.description: Tail, baseplate, and fiber proteins for attachment and DNA injection (bacteriophage-like viruses)

Occlusion Body Protein.description: Proteins forming occlusion bodies or inclusion bodies that protect virions (baculoviruses, poxviruses)

RNA-Dependent RNA Polymerase (RdRp).description: RNA-dependent RNA polymerases catalyzing viral RNA genome replication and transcription

DNA Polymerase.description: DNA polymerases catalyzing viral DNA genome replication

Reverse Transcriptase.description: Reverse transcriptases synthesizing DNA from RNA templates (retroviruses, pararetroviruses)

Helicase.description: Helicases unwinding DNA or RNA duplexes during replication and recombination

NTPase/ATPase.description: NTPases and ATPases providing energy for various viral processes (not helicases or packaging)

Primase/Primase-Polymerase.description: Primases synthesizing RNA primers for DNA replication

Genome-Linked Protein (VPg/Terminal).description: Proteins covalently linked to viral genome termini, serving as primers

mRNA Capping/Methyltransferase.description: Enzymes catalyzing mRNA cap synthesis and methylation

Nuclease (Endo/Exonuclease).description: Nucleases involved in genome processing, recombination, or cap-snatching

Replication Cofactor/Processivity Factor.description: Cofactors stabilizing polymerase complexes and enhancing processivity

Viral Protease.description: Viral proteases cleaving polyproteins into mature functional proteins

Polyprotein Precursor.description: Polyprotein precursors encoding multiple proteins cleaved post-translationally

Transcriptional Regulator/Transactivator.description: Proteins regulating viral and host transcription

RNA-Binding Regulatory Protein.description: RNA-binding proteins regulating RNA stability, translation, and packaging

RNA Export/Splicing Regulator.description: Proteins regulating RNA nuclear export and splicing (retroviruses, nuclear DNA viruses)

Assembly/Morphogenesis Factor.description: Proteins coordinating virion assembly, morphogenesis, and budding

Innate Immune/Interferon Antagonist.description: Proteins antagonizing innate immunity, particularly interferon pathways

Apoptosis/Cell-Cycle Modulator.description: Viral proteins modulating host apoptosis and cell-cycle pathways

Cytokine/Receptor Mimic or Modulator.description: Viral mimics of cytokines or receptors, or proteins modulating cytokine signaling

Host Shutoff/Translation Inhibitor.description: Proteins inhibiting host mRNA translation or transcription

Virion Release/Budding Facilitator.description: Proteins facilitating virion release and budding from cells

Movement Protein.description: Proteins mediating cell-to-cell movement in plant viruses

Integrase/Recombinase.description: Enzymes integrating viral DNA into host genome or mediating recombination

Episome Maintenance/Replication Origin B.description: Proteins maintaining episomal viral genomes and ensuring replication/segregation

Membrane Remodeling/Replication Organell.description: Proteins inducing membrane vesicles and replication organelles

Viroporin/Ion Channel.description: Small membrane proteins forming ion channels

Nucleotide Metabolism Enzyme.description: Enzymes modulating dNTP pools for viral DNA replication

Viral Kinase/Phosphoprotein.description: Viral kinases phosphorylating viral/host proteins; phosphoproteins regulating replication

Ligase.description: Viral ligases joining DNA or RNA molecules

Ubiquitin/SUMO Pathway Protein.description: Proteins modulating ubiquitin or SUMO pathways

Other Viral Enzyme.description: Other viral enzymes (lipases, esterases, deaminases, etc.)

Viroplasm/Viral Factory Protein.description: Proteins forming viral replication factories or viroplasms

Accessory/Virulence Factor.description: Accessory proteins modulating virulence, host range, or tissue tropism

Non-Structural Protein (General).description: General non-structural proteins with diverse or unclear roles

Hypothetical Protein.description: Proteins with unknown or uncharacterized function
